candidate_definition_hints.text: This repository hosts a suite of specialized agents designed to power your brainstorming sessions. Each agent brings a unique perspective and tailored approach to generate creative, targeted solutions for diverse challenges. Choose the right agent for your specific brainstorming needs and unlock innovative ideas with precision.

source_repo_description: This repository hosts a suite of specialized agents designed to power your brainstorming sessions. Each agent brings a unique perspective and tailored approach to generate creative, targeted solutions for diverse challenges. Choose the right agent for your specific brainstorming needs and unlock innovative ideas with precision.
